---
title: "Easter Egg Collection"
filters:
  - easter-eggs
---

This extension ports [WeiChiaChang](https://github.com/WeiChiaChang)'s [Easter Egg Collection](https://github.com/WeiChiaChang/easter-egg-collection/tree/master) to Quarto — type a keyword anywhere on a rendered page and a fun animation pops in.

## Installation

```bash
quarto add parmsam/quarto-easter-eggs
```

Then add the filter to your document's YAML header:

```yaml
filters:
  - easter-eggs
```

## Easter Eggs

**Try typing any keyword from the table below while viewing this page.**

| **Keyword** | **Description** |
|:------------|:----------------|
| hi | A waving hand greets you 👋 |
| wink | An animated wink flies across 😜 |
| unicorn | A unicorn gallops across the screen 🦄 |
| kumamon | Kumamon the bear dances in 🐻 |
| haha | A laughing face pops up ☺️ |
| travel | A traveler makes their journey across 🌇 |
| bat | A bat swoops across ⚰ |
| robot | A dancing robot appears 🤖 |
| hiphop | A hip-hop dancer grooves across 🎶 |
| hippo | A hippo slides onto the screen 😎 |
| pokeball | A pokeball rolls across 🚀 |
| pie | A spinning pie appears 🍕 |
| ufo | A UFO abducts your screen 👽 |
| walk | A strolling figure crosses the screen 🚶 |
| cool | A cool character struts in 😎 |
| balloon | A balloon drifts upward 🎈 |
| hangover | A hungover character stumbles in 🍷 |
| kirby | Kirby bounces across ༼ つ ◕\_◕ ༽つ |
| no | A no-smoking sign appears 🚬 |
| onmyway | A walking figure heads off somewhere 🚶 |
| haters | A haters-gonna-hate dancer glides by 🤔 |
| board | A skateboarder rides through 👾 |
| snorlax | Snorlax dozes across the screen 😆 |
| fly | A flying creature zips by 🐛 |
| earth | The earth rises into view 🌎 |
| thankyou | A thank-you animation plays 🙏 |
| swim | A swimmer splashes across 🏊 |
| penguin | A penguin waddles in 🐧 |
| handsome | A handsome fellow makes his entrance 😎 |
| winner | A victory celebration appears 🏆 |
| tank | A tank rolls across ⤵ |
| jump | A character leaps across the screen 🏐 |
| fox | A fox trots by 🐺 |
| mario | Mario runs through 🎮 |
| joker | The Joker makes an appearance 🃏 |
| rabbit | A rabbit hops across 🐇 |
| sensei | Sensei bows gracefully 🏫 |
| piggy | A wild boar charges through 🐷 |
| psyduck | Psyduck appears with a big bang 💣 |
| dragon | A dragon soars across 🐲 |
| salamander | A salamander slinks by 🤔 |
| airguitar | An air guitar hero shreds 🎸 |
| pikachu | Pikachu rises from the bottom with lightning ⚡ |
| bravo | A clapping figure slides in from the left 👏 |
| ghost | A ghost drifts from right to left 👻 |
| britney | Britney winks at you 😉 |
| pikarun | Pikachu sprints across like a flash 📸 |
| catrun | A cat dashes across 💕 |
| koggy | Koggy bounces in |
| sonic | Sonic races through the screen |
| doggy | A dog trots across |
| spongebob | SpongeBob makes an appearance 🛀 |
| gun | A gun animation fires up 🔫 |
| money | A no-money sign appears 💸 |
| homer | Homer Simpson wanders in 🏠 |
| dog | A dog runs across 🐶 |
| bird | A jumping bird flutters by 🐦 |
| piqiu | Piqiu hops in |
| lol | A laughing animation erupts 😂 |
| ohhh | Mordecai & Rigby appear with OHHHHHHHHHHHHHH 😮 |
| nyancat | Nyan cat flies across the screen 🐱 |
